description: Ingests raw source material and distills it into an indexed executable mental model stored in the knowledge library.
trigger_condition: When you have a new framework / book / article to internalize as a reusable mental model.

description: Takes a mental model from the library and applies it to a real challenge — generating a step-by-step actionable protocol.
trigger_condition: When you have a problem and want to apply a known mental model to it with precision.

description: Bulletproofs a high-stakes plan using Inversionist attack + Critic bias audit + Architect hardening.
trigger_condition: Before committing to any major strategic decision or system design.

description: Unblocks impossible problems by stripping to axioms (Thinker) and rebuilding from first principles (Engineer + Architect).
trigger_condition: When every solution feels like a variation of the same broken approach.

description: Solves a problem by importing structural logic from a completely different domain — cross-domain synthesis for non-obvious solutions.
trigger_condition: When domain-local thinking has been exhausted and you need a fundamentally different approach.

description: Audits a system for entropy — abstraction bloat / complexity debt / coupling failures — and produces an executable optimization directive.
trigger_condition: When a working system is slowing down or no one fully understands it anymore.
